summary: A queue of 180 roast batches for one drum coffee roaster (capacity 1), spanning 6 roast profile states over a horizon of 5,760 minutes (8 12-hour roast days). Every job could meet its due time if started the moment it is released, so lateness here is a sequencing choice, not a structural constraint. Rejection (the outside option) averages 24.8x the in-house cost.

reading.machine: one drum coffee roaster (capacity 1), starting from an idle/clean state
reading.setup: temperature ramp plus chamber sweep between profiles; decaf requires a deep clean-out for flavor carryover, micro-lots get a careful slow start
reading.note: numbers identical to the source CSV — synthetic, reproducible from committed seeds; not production records
